case_title: MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. VS UTOPIA TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTFD.MAIL TO GENE POWERS, V.P.UTOPIA TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $244.90 FILED BY MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UTOPIA TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UTOPIA TECHNOLOGY PARTNERS INC. $244.90 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $270.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
